pages.text: A dead stone that remembers what the world was trying to forget. This is the core rare material of higher relic work.
$(l)Oblivion Stone$() is used in ring progression, idol forging, Aredrite armor, and other high-tier recipes. The draft wiki places it as a rare reward from dangerous structures and major bosses.
What remains when End-born power is burned past memory. Void Ashes are the last fuel before awakening the sin weapons.
The final forge recipes for Sloth, Pride, and Envy all require $(l)Void Ashes$().
